name: The Last AntLion
short_description: On an ant hill far away, a malevolent mantis commands a UFO, abducting ants. With the queen by his side, their mission: wipe out antlions once and for all. You, the last hope, must outsmart the mantis, protect your kin, and ensure survival. The fate of antlions hangs in the balance.
detailed_description:
From my commanding perch atop an ant hill, I, the malevolent mantis, control a powerful UFO, snatching ants with sinister glee. The queen by my side, we share an unyielding mission: total eradication of the antlions. Little do you know, there are eight formidable waves of ants I've summoned. Worker ants, fire ants, ghost ants, electric ants, pharaoh ants, mummy ants, dinosaur ants, and relentless army ants—each more formidable than the last. But wait, there's more! In this battle for dominance, you'll encounter treasure beyond imagination. Gold, arrows, bombs, potions, armor—upgrades that promise to grant you the power to face the entire ant army. However, don't be deluded by your puny dreams of triumph. The road ahead is treacherous, and the odds are stacked against you. Brace yourself for your inevitable downfall, as my malevolence remains unchallenged, and the ants tremble before our wrath.

Use ANY of the following Controls:
Shoot: 1, H, J, SHIFT LEFT, SHIFT RIGHT, NUMPAD1, NUMPAD4
Roar: 2, Y, U
Potion: 3, T, I, BACKSLASH, NUMPAD2, NUMPAD8
Bomb: 4, F, L, NUMPAD3, NUMPAD6
Run: LEFT ARROW, RIGHT ARROW, A, D
Jump: SPACE, UP ARROW, W, G, K, NUMPAD0, NUMPAD5
Select: MOUSE
Pause/Retry: ESC
Mute: M
